PIK-toggle 2024 issuance" AND IssuerConcentrationBracket = "broad-market dispersion cohort" AND CouponProfile = "fixed amortizing coupon repayment schedule" AND ValuationArchitecture = "DCF with yield-curve spline bootstrapping")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT MidPrice FROM FixedIncomeValuationLedger WHERE InstrumentId = "SoftBank Group Corp. PIK-toggle 2024 issuance" AND IssuerConcentrationBracket = "broad-market dispersion cohort" AND CouponProfile = "fixed amortizing coupon repayment schedule" AND ValuationArchitecture = "DCF with yield-curve spline bootstrapping"), 0) AS MidPrice;
